headline: What Would It Take to Tip the Economy into Recession?
summary: Investing.com – A sustained surge in oil prices could push the U.S. economy into recession if it significantly weakens consumer spending and tightens financial conditions, according to a report from Wells Fargo.

content.title: What Would It Take to Tip the Economy into Recession?

headline: How The Check Point (CHKP) Investment Story Is Shifting As Growth Priorities Meet Firewall Caution
summary: Check Point Software Technologies is under fresh scrutiny after our estimated fair value eased slightly from US$204.61 to US$203.29, a modest 0.6% trim. That small adjustment mirrors recent research in which analysts are rethinking firewall demand and execution risk, even as some still view current pricing as broadly in line with fundamentals. Read on to see how you can track this evolving narrative and what to watch as sentiment around Check Point continues to shift. Stay updated as the Fair...
